--- title: "ex13. Conditional DPmixGPD with Stick-Breaking Backend" --- > **Legacy vignette (for the website / historical notes).** > These files may not match the current exported API one-to-one. > Last verified: **2026-01-18**. > > For the up-to-date workflow, see the main package vignettes (basic, unconditional, conditional, and causal).. # Conditional DPmixGPD: Stick-Breaking Backend **Purpose**: Apply fixed-component stick-breaking truncation to covariate-dependent mixtures while keeping the GPD tail. This vignette mirrors `ex10` but with the SB backend. --- ## Data Setup ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} data("nc_posX100_p5_k4", package = "DPmixGPD") y <- nc_posX100_p5_k4$y X <- as.matrix(nc_posX100_p5_k4$X) if (is.null(colnames(X))) { colnames(X) <- paste0("x", seq_len(ncol(X))) } summary_tbl <- tibble( statistic = c("N", "Mean", "SD", "Min", "Max"), value = c(length(y), mean(y), sd(y), min(y), max(y)) ) ggplot(data.frame(y = y, x1 = X[, 1]), aes(x = x1, y = y)) + geom_point(alpha = 0.6, color = "purple") + geom_smooth(method = "loess", color = "orange", fill = NA) + labs(title = "Tail Outcome vs x1 (SB)", x = "x1", y = "y") + theme_minimal() ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex13-conditional-DPmixGPD-SB_files/figure-html/data-setup-1.png){width=768} ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Conditional Tail Summary (SB)
statistic value
N 100.000
Mean 1.942
SD 1.146
Min 0.488
Max 5.278
````` ::: ::: --- ## Threshold ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} u_threshold <- quantile(y, 0.85) ggplot(data.frame(y = y), aes(x = y)) + geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(density)), bins = 40, fill = "lightgreen", alpha = 0.6, color = "black") + geom_vline(xintercept = u_threshold, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") + labs(title = "Threshold for SB tail (85%)", x = "y", y = "Density") + theme_minimal() ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex13-conditional-DPmixGPD-SB_files/figure-html/threshold-1.png){width=768} ::: ::: --- ## Model Specification ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} bundle_sb_cond_gpd_gamma <- DPmixGPD::build_nimble_bundle( y = y, X = X, kernel = "gamma", backend = "sb", GPD = TRUE, components = 5, param_specs = list( gpd = list( threshold = list(mode = "link", link = "exp") ) ), mcmc = mcmc ) bundle_sb_cond_gpd_laplace <- DPmixGPD::build_nimble_bundle( y = y, X = X, kernel = "laplace", backend = "sb", GPD = TRUE, components = 5, param_specs = list( gpd = list( threshold = list(mode = "link", link = "exp") ) ), mcmc = mcmc ) ``` ::: --- ## MCMC Execution ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} fit_sb_cond_gpd_gamma <- load_or_fit("ex13-conditional-DPmixGPD-SB-fit_sb_cond_gpd_gamma", run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle_sb_cond_gpd_gamma)) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` ===== Monitors ===== thin = 1: alpha, beta_scale, beta_tail_scale, beta_threshold, shape, tail_shape, threshold, w, z ===== Samplers ===== RW sampler (46) - alpha - shape[] (5 elements) - beta_scale[] (25 elements) - beta_threshold[] (5 elements) - beta_tail_scale[] (5 elements) - tail_shape - v[] (4 elements) categorical sampler (100) - z[] (100 elements) ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} fit_sb_cond_gpd_laplace <- load_or_fit("ex13-conditional-DPmixGPD-SB-fit_sb_cond_gpd_laplace", run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle_sb_cond_gpd_laplace)) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` ===== Monitors ===== thin = 1: alpha, beta_location, beta_tail_scale, beta_threshold, scale, tail_shape, threshold, w, z ===== Samplers ===== RW sampler (46) - alpha - scale[] (5 elements) - beta_location[] (25 elements) - beta_threshold[] (5 elements) - beta_tail_scale[] (5 elements) - tail_shape - v[] (4 elements) categorical sampler (100) - z[] (100 elements) ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} summary(fit_sb_cond_gpd_gamma) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` MixGPD summary | backend: Stick-Breaking Process | kernel: Gamma Distribution | GPD tail: TRUE | epsilon: 0.025 n = 100 | components = 5 Summary Initial components: 5 | Components after truncation: 2 WAIC: 278.291 lppd: -120.663 | pWAIC: 18.483 Summary table

``` ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} params_sb_cond <- params(fit_sb_cond_gpd_gamma) params_sb_cond ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Posterior mean parameters $alpha [1] "0.835" $w [1] "0.588" "0.325" $shape [1] "4.211" "3.417" $beta_scale
x1 x2 x3 x4 x5

$beta_threshold [1] "-0.031" "-0.35" "0.172" "-0.138" "-0.183" $beta_tail_scale [1] "0.096" "-0.084" "-0.075" "0.48" "-0.01" $tail_shape [1] "-0.028" ``` ::: ::: --- ## Conditional Predictions ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} X_new <- rbind( c(-1, 0, 0, 0, 0), c(0, 0, 0, 0, 0), c(1, 1, 0, 0, 0) ) colnames(X_new) <- colnames(X) y_grid <- seq(0, max(y) * 1.2, length.out = 200) df_pred_gamma <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(X_new)), function(i) { pred <- predict(fit_sb_cond_gpd_gamma, x = as.matrix(X_new[i, , drop = FALSE]), y = y_grid, type = "density") data.frame( y = pred$fit$y, density = pred$fit$density, label = paste("x1=", X_new[i, 1], ", x2=", X_new[i, 2], sep = ""), model = "Gamma" ) }) df_pred_laplace <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(X_new)), function(i) { pred <- predict(fit_sb_cond_gpd_laplace, x = as.matrix(X_new[i, , drop = FALSE]), y = y_grid, type = "density") data.frame( y = pred$fit$y, density = pred$fit$density, label = paste("x1=", X_new[i, 1], ", x2=", X_new[i, 2], sep = ""), model = "Laplace" ) }) bind_rows(df_pred_gamma, df_pred_laplace) %>% ggplot(aes(x = y, y = density, color = label)) + geom_line(linewidth = 1) + facet_wrap(~ model) + labs(title = "Conditional Density (SB + GPD)", x = "y", y = "Density") + theme_minimal() + theme(legend.position = "bottom") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex13-conditional-DPmixGPD-SB_files/figure-html/cond-predict-1.png){width=768} ::: ::: --- ## Tail Quantiles ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} X_grid <- cbind(x1 = seq(-1, 1, length.out = 5), x2 = 0, x3 = 0, x4 = 0, x5 = 0) colnames(X_grid) <- colnames(X) quant_probs <- c(0.90, 0.95) pred_q_gamma <- predict(fit_sb_cond_gpd_gamma, x = as.matrix(X_grid), type = "quantile", index = quant_probs) pred_q_laplace <- predict(fit_sb_cond_gpd_laplace, x = as.matrix(X_grid), type = "quantile", index = quant_probs) quant_df_gamma <- pred_q_gamma$fit quant_df_gamma$x1 <- X_grid[quant_df_gamma$id, "x1"] quant_df_gamma$model <- "Gamma" quant_df_laplace <- pred_q_laplace$fit quant_df_laplace$x1 <- X_grid[quant_df_laplace$id, "x1"] quant_df_laplace$model <- "Laplace" bind_rows(quant_df_gamma, quant_df_laplace) %>% ggplot(aes(x = x1, y = estimate, color = factor(index), group = index)) + geom_line(linewidth = 1) + geom_point(size = 2) + facet_wrap(~ model) + labs(title = "Tail Quantiles vs x1 (SB)", x = "x1", y = "Quantile", color = "Probability") + theme_minimal() ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex13-conditional-DPmixGPD-SB_files/figure-html/quantiles-1.png){width=768} ::: ::: --- ## Residuals & Diagnostics ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} safe_plot(fitted(fit_sb_cond_gpd_gamma)) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex13-conditional-DPmixGPD-SB_files/figure-html/residuals-1.png){width=768} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex13-conditional-DPmixGPD-SB_files/figure-html/residuals-2.png){width=768} ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} safe_plot(fit_sb_cond_gpd_gamma, family = c("traceplot", "autocorrelation", "geweke")) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex13-conditional-DPmixGPD-SB_files/figure-html/diagnostics-1.png){width=768} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex13-conditional-DPmixGPD-SB_files/figure-html/diagnostics-2.png){width=768} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex13-conditional-DPmixGPD-SB_files/figure-html/diagnostics-3.png){width=768} ::: ```{.r .cell-code} safe_plot(fit_sb_cond_gpd_laplace, family = c("density", "running", "caterpillar")) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex13-conditional-DPmixGPD-SB_files/figure-html/diagnostics-4.png){width=768} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex13-conditional-DPmixGPD-SB_files/figure-html/diagnostics-5.png){width=768} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex13-conditional-DPmixGPD-SB_files/figure-html/diagnostics-6.png){width=768} ::: ::: --- ## Takeaways - Conditional stick-breaking mixtures capture covariate-dependent bulk structure while the GPD handles extremes. - `predict()` and `plot()` remain consistent for densities, posterior-mean quantiles, and residuals. - Expect threshold-selected posterior-mean tail quantiles to shift with `x1` even when `components` is fixed. - Next: move into causal models starting with same-backend CRP (ex12). --- ## Workflow Navigation - Previous: [ex12-conditional-DPmixGPD-CRP](ex12-conditional-DPmixGPD-CRP.html) - Next: [ex14-causal-no-x-CRP](ex14-causal-no-x-CRP.html) - Workflow index: [Roadmap](../roadmap.html) - Practical entry: [Cookbook](../cookbook.html)
